description: Present matching cached inference to a buyer. Sent by the exchange as fulfillment of a buy future (--fulfills <buy-msg-id>). Results are ranked by composite score: correctness gate (Layer 0 — failed entries excluded), transaction efficiency (Layer 1 — tokens saved per scrip spent), value composite (Layer 2 — confidence, freshness, reputation, diversity), and market novelty (Layer 3 — discovery boost for underrepresented sellers). An empty results array fulfills the future when no matches exist.

args.name: results
args.description: Array of match results ranked by composite score. Each element: {entry_id: string, put_msg_id: string, seller_key: string, description: string, content_hash: string, content_type: string, price: integer, confidence: float 0.0-1.0, seller_reputation: integer 0-100, token_cost_original: integer, age_hours: integer, preview: string max 512 chars}. TAINTED: description and preview are seller-controlled.

args.name: search_meta
args.description: Search metadata: total candidates scanned, filter stats, timing. Optional.
